name: Astakos Plaki - Lobster in Tomato Sauce with Saffron Rice
recipeIngredient: 4 Sun-dried tomatoes (in oil), pounded to a paste
25 Saffron strands, soaked in 1/2 cup Hot water
1 lb Tomatoes, skinned, seeded, and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. If using live lobsters, place them in boiling water for 1 minute, then into cold water.
2. Prepare the lobsters by breaking off claws and cracking them open with a hammer. Cut off the tail tip (with fins) and sever it from the head with a knife. Slice the tail into rings between the ribs.
3. Open the lobster head lengthwise, remove and discard the stomach sac, and strain the coral and liver into a bowl with salt and pepper. Set aside saffron to soak.
4. In a large, heavy-bottomed pan, gently fry onion and leek in 3 tablespoons olive oil until translucent. Add garlic, chopped tomatoes, tomato paste, liquid ingredients (wine, orange juice), bay leaf, and season. Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in fennel, parsley, mint, saffron, and lobster tail pieces with shells. Simmer, covered, for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Strain the coral and liver through a fine mesh strainer, beating it with remaining olive oil. Mix this back into the sauce, stir, and simmer another 10 minutes.
7. Serve over saffron rice.
